'''tawacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyng|kyng]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyng|kyng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tawacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwæchæth|tæwæchæth]] || [[word:tæwæchæj|tæwæchæj]] || [[word:tæwæchæsh|tæwæchæsh]] || [[word:tæwæchæ|tæwæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawawachath|tawawachath]] || [[word:tawawachaj|tawawachaj]] || [[word:tawawachash|tawawachash]] || [[word:tawawacha|tawawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawachath|tawachath]] || [[word:tawachaj|tawachaj]] || [[word:tawachash|tawachash]] || [[word:tawacha|tawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawafchath|tawafchath]] || [[word:tawafchaj|tawafchaj]] || [[word:tawafchash|tawafchash]] || [[word:tawafchaf|tawafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawachatha|tawachatha]] || [[word:tawachaja|tawachaja]] || [[word:tawachasha|tawachasha]] || [[word:tawachaka|tawachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawachath|tawachath]] || [[word:tawachaj|tawachaj]] || [[word:tawachash|tawachash]] || [[word:tawacha|tawacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawachathal|tawachathal]] || [[word:tawachajal|tawachajal]] || [[word:tawachashal|tawachashal]] || [[word:tawachakal|tawachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawachathatha|tawachathatha]] || [[word:tawachajaja|tawachajaja]] || [[word:tawachashasha|tawachashasha]] || [[word:tawachaka|tawachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawachathan|tawachathan]] || [[word:tawachajan|tawachajan]] || [[word:tawachashan|tawachashan]] || [[word:tawachakan|tawachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawachathaoro|tawachathaoro]] || [[word:tawachajaoro|tawachajaoro]] || [[word:tawachashaoro|tawachashaoro]] || [[word:tawachakaoro|tawachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
